mapper.select: /* OmsMasterInfoMapper.xml selectOwnerList */ SELECT OWKEY , OWNM , REGNO , BIZTYPE , BIZCTG , CITY , STATE , TEL1 , TEL2 , FAX , CONTACT , CEO , CNTRYCD , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , ZIPCD , DELYN , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey}

/* OmsMasterInfoMapper.xml selectTOrderMstCtMngtY */ SELECT CTKEY , CTNM , CLOSDATE , DELYN , CNTRYCD , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , ZIPCD , TEL , REGNO , IFYN , CTSUMMARYNM , SAFEIVOWNCRIT , IVOWNCRITDAYS , MANAGEMENTYN , CTLEADTIME , GRTIVDAYS , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_CT WHERE MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N'
